symptoms.symptom: Write stage failed to produce a clean analyzed build; generated code references undefined named parameters 'label' and 'isSelected' on a widget, blocking any capture or trusted verification.
symptoms.detail: dart analyze (generated) reports 12 errors in lib/generated/mobile_checkout_layout.dart:39 for undefined_named_parameter on 'label' and 'isSelected'. This prevents the project from compiling or serving.

symptoms.symptom: Candidate widget code contains a non-existent class reference 'MaskGroupWidget' that survived multiple LLM repair attempts, keeping the widgets-first gate from passing.
symptoms.detail: lib/widgets/success_widget2.dart references 'MaskGroupWidget' which is not a defined class. LLM repair attempts 4–6 could not resolve it, so the screen integration gate was never reached.

symptoms.symptom: No capture was produced because the pipeline never reached a runnable build stage; capture_passport shows capture_kind=not_run and failure_class=PATCH_RUNTIME.
symptoms.detail: With analyze failing at the write stage and widgets-first gate, the pipeline never attempted Flutter serve or capture. The served_build_run_id is present but the verdict is CANDIDATE_ONLY and writeback was skipped.

symptoms.symptom: Writeback was skipped because the produced candidate never passed the required quality gates, so no verified product truth was written to project lib.
symptoms.detail: run_manifest.writeback=skipped, verdict=CANDIDATE_ONLY. The candidate exists but was never committed, leaving the feature in an untrusted generated-only state.
